name: Lean Chicken Tetrazzini
recipeIngredient: 3 cups (approximately 1-1/2 pounds) diced cooked chicken breast
1/2 pound white mushrooms, cleaned, sliced, and briefly sauteed in 1 teaspoon olive oil
1/2 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese (2 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water and salt to a boil, then cook spaghetti until al dente. Drain well.
2. Preheat oven to 475°F.
3. Bring water in the bottom of a double boiler to a low simmer. Place the top of the double boiler on the simmering water.
4. Add cottage cheese to the double boiler and stir often until melted. Add chicken, mushrooms, white pepper, and sherry. Stir together.
5. Place drained spaghetti in a lightly oiled (1 teaspoon) casserole dish. Spoon chicken sauce mixture over the top of the spaghetti. Dust with breadcrumbs and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
6. Place in oven for approximately 10-12 minutes, or until the topping begins to glaze. Serve immediately.
